jobs.title: Portfolio Showcase Website Design
jobs.description:
I’m ready to turn my existing logo and color palette into a sleek online portfolio that highlights my work and story. The site only needs three core sections—Home, About Us, and a Blog area—yet each has to feel cohesive under the same visual language.

Here’s what I need from you:  

• A responsive design that looks polished on desktop and mobile  
• A Home page that immediately showcases featured projects or imagery  
• An About Us page laid out for a short narrative, headshot, and contact prompt  
• A Blog template that matches the rest of the site’s style so I can post updates easily

jobs.title: Pre-Employment Vetting Project, Taiwan
jobs.description:
I must verify the employment history of prospective hires who have worked in Taiwan before their offers can be finalized. The task involves contacting each past employer named by the candidates, confirming their dates of employment, job titles, and (when possible) the reason for departure. All work needs to comply with Taiwanese privacy and labour regulations, so discretion and accurate record-keeping are critical.
